document.title: Service Taxonomy Extension Catalog — Heritage Gold → LAWIM_V2
document.description: Complete machine-readable catalog of all service-related extensions required for LAWIM_V2: monetized services, real estate services, professional services, CRM monetized services, and service lifecycle

service_families.description: Eleven service families forming the taxonomy backbone

values.description: Core real estate services: valuation, visits, listings, transactions
Legal services: notary, legal advice, transaction accompaniment
Skilled trades: masonry, carpentry, painting, tiling, roofing, plumbing, electrical
Financial services: tax advice, insurance, valuation, financing
Document services: verification, document control, title checks
Marketing and media: photography, videography, drone, staging, publication
Management services: rental management, condo management, syndicate

service_categories.description: Four economic categories for service classification

values.description: Professional trades and skilled services (12 new + 15 existing in V2)

Service.description: Catalog item defining a monetized service with fixed price, classification, and lifecycle

ServiceOrder.description: Customer purchase of a service with 8-state lifecycle

Payment.description: Payment processing for service orders with 10-state sub-machine, Campay integration

AgentCredit.description: Agent credit balance and transaction tracking for lead and boost purchases

LeadPurchase.description: Agent purchase of lead contact information

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model has no boost_level or boost_expires_at fields
extensions.proposed_structure: Add boost_level enum and boost_expires_at datetime to Property model; implement boost purchase flow via ServiceOrder
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All matching matrices (boost affects ranking score)

extensions.current_limitation: Same as boost_7j — no boost system exists
extensions.proposed_entity: Property (boost fields, same system as MON-001)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as same boost system with duration parameter (7 vs 30 days); Service.code='boost_30j' with price_fcfa=5000
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All matching matrices (boost affects ranking score)

extensions.current_limitation: No premium listing concept in V2 Property model
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 2: Property/Listing Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add is_premium Boolean to Property; implement premium ranking boost in matching engine (+10 score boost); Service.code='premium_listing' with price_fcfa=10000
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All matching matrices (premium adds +10 score boost)

extensions.current_limitation: No subscription model exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Subscription model linked to Organization/User with monthly billing via Campay; Service.code='agent_pro' with price_fcfa=10000/month
required_permissions: ADMIN: configure subscription pricing and features
extensions.human_decision_question: Subscription billing cycle, features, and cancellation policy

extensions.current_limitation: No visit accompaniment service model in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 7: Visit Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='visit_accompaniment' linked to Visit; Service.code='accompagnement_visite' with price_fcfa=50000
extensions.human_decision_question: Visit accompaniment scope and delivery model

extensions.current_limitation: No transaction accompaniment service model in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 9: Transaction Workflow
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='transaction_accompaniment' with fulfillment tracking; Service.code='accompagnement_transaction' with price_fcfa=50000

extensions.current_limitation: No document verification service in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 14: Document Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Defer to later phase; requires document upload and verification workflow; Service.code='controle_documentaire' with price_fcfa=5000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media model supports photo storage but not professional photography service ordering
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 14: Document Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with service order origin tracking; Service.code='photographie_pro' with price_fcfa=15000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media model supports video but no professional video production service
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 14: Document Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with service order origin for video services; Service.code='video_pro' with price_fcfa=25000

extensions.current_limitation: No property verification_status field in V2
extensions.proposed_domain: Domain 3: Service Model + Domain 2: Property/Listing Model
extensions.proposed_structure: Add verification_status and verified_at to Property; implement verification as ServiceOrder; Service.code='verification_bien' with price_fcfa=10000
H0.5_matrices_impacted: All matching matrices (verification affects trust score)

extensions.current_limitation: No pay-per-connection mechanism exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement LeadPurchase model + agent credit system. This is the single most important monetization mechanism. Service.code='mise_en_relation' with price_fcfa=500 per connection
extensions.human_decision_question: Pay-per-connection pricing and agent opt-in flow

extensions.current_limitation: No premium assistant service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Requires human decision on distinction from accompagnement services before implementing; Service.code='assistance_personnalisee' with price_fcfa=50000
extensions.human_decision_question: Distinction from accompagnement_visite and accompagnement_transaction services

extensions.current_limitation: Distinct from boost (2,000/5,000) and premium_listing (10,000) — unclear differentiation
extensions.proposed_structure: Requires human decision to determine distinct semantics vs boost/premium_listing; Service.code='visibilite_premium' with price_fcfa=7500
extensions.human_decision_question: Semantic distinction from boost (2 tiers) and premium_listing services

extensions.current_limitation: No valuation service or matrix in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement estimation service matrix with valuation workflow; Service.code='estimation_immobiliere' with price_fcfa=15000

extensions.current_limitation: No expertise service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement expertise service with inspection workflow; Service.code='expertise_immobiliere' with price_fcfa=25000

extensions.current_limitation: No document verification service matrix in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Linked to controle_documentaire monetized service; implement verification workflow; Service.code='verification_documentaire' with price_fcfa=10000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Conversation model links user-property but has no visit scheduling or accompaniment tracking
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement visit scheduling as a service with state machine; Service.code='visite_property' with price_fcfa=5000
required_states: Visit.status ∈ {requested, awaiting_confirmation, confirmed, rescheduled, cancelled, completed, refused, absent_demandeur, absent_holder}

extensions.current_limitation: No visit follow-up tracking in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend visit infrastructure with contre-visite type; Service.code='contre_visite' with price_fcfa=5000

extensions.current_limitation: No rental management service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement rental management workflow with recurring service model; Service.code='gestion_locative' with price_fcfa=10000/month
extensions.human_decision_question: Rental management scope: full management vs referral only

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement listing as a service with order tracking; Service.code='mise_en_location' with price_fcfa=20000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing
extensions.proposed_structure: Same as mise_en_location but for sale transaction; Service.code='mise_en_vente' with price_fcfa=25000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Property has publishedAt but no publication workflow as a service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement publication service with channel management; Service.code='publication_service' with price_fcfa=5000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media stores photos but has no service ordering for photography
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media model with photography service order flow; Service.code='photographie_immobiliere' with price_fcfa=15000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Media supports video but no video service ordering
extensions.proposed_structure: Extend Media with video service order flow; Service.code='video_immobiliere' with price_fcfa=25000

extensions.current_limitation: No drone service capability in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as sub-service of photography; Service.code='drone_service' with price_fcfa=35000

extensions.current_limitation: No staging service model in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service with staging workflow; Service.code='home_staging' with price_fcfa=30000

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Project.projectType can represent renovation generically but no dedicated service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement renovation service with scope management; Service.code='renovation_service'

extensions.current_limitation: V2 Project.projectType can represent construction generically but no dedicated service
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement construction service with project management; Service.code='construction_service'

extensions.current_limitation: No maintenance service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as recurring service; Service.code='entretien_property'

extensions.current_limitation: No cleaning service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service; Service.code='nettoyage_property'

extensions.current_limitation: No security service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service; Service.code='securisation_property'

extensions.current_limitation: No moving service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional service; Service.code='demenagement'

extensions.current_limitation: No insurance service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner referral service; Service.code='assurance_service'

extensions.current_limitation: No legal advice service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner professional service with lawyer network; Service.code='conseil_juridique_immobilier'

extensions.current_limitation: No tax advice service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as partner professional service; Service.code='conseil_fiscal_immobilier'

extensions.current_limitation: No condo management service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as professional management service; Service.code='gestion_copropriete'

extensions.current_limitation: No rent recovery service in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement as dispute resolution service; Service.code='recouvrement_locatif'
extensions.human_decision_question: Rent recovery scope: advisory vs active collection

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'mason' to business_profiles.py; add 'mason' to professional_category enum values

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'carpenter' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'painter' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'tiler' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'roofer' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'real_estate_expert' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'appraiser' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'condo_manager' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'drone_videographer' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'broker' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'security_guard' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: Not in V2 business_profiles.py
extensions.proposed_structure: Add 'admin_service_provider' to business_profiles.py

extensions.current_limitation: No service order or service lifecycle exists in V2
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement ServiceOrder model with 8-state lifecycle: création → proposition → acceptation → paiement → activation → utilisation → expiration → archivage
required_fields: ServiceOrder.status: Enum (created | proposed | accepted | payment_pending | paid | activated | in_use | expired | archived | cancelled)
required_states: ServiceOrder.status ∈ {created, proposed, accepted, payment_pending, paid, activated, in_use, expired, archived, cancelled}

extensions.current_limitation: No payment processing system active in V2 (feature flag payments=OFF)
extensions.proposed_structure: Implement Payment model with 10-state sub-machine: CREATED → INITIATED → PENDING → CONFIRMED → FAILED → CANCELLED → EXPIRED → REFUNDED → RECONCILED → DISPUTED; integrate Campay Mobile Money
required_fields: Payment.status: Enum (created | initiated | pending | confirmed | failed | cancelled | expired | refunded | reconciled | disputed)
required_states: Payment.status ∈ {created, initiated, pending, confirmed, failed, cancelled, expired, refunded, reconciled, disputed}
extensions.human_decision_question: Payment processor selection: Campay (Gold) or multi-processor
